meta.footEn: Data snapshot: 2026-07-12 · Garmin fenix 8 via Freddy

en.c4d: level vs previous night · −3 vs avg (40)
en.c5d: computed from sleep, HRV, RHR, stress & recent load
en.today: Today: rest / easy hike or bike
en.rec: A longer but lighter night to open Sunday: 7h43 at score 78 off a 22:16 bedtime — 14 minutes over the 7-day average (7h29), but the quality slipped. Deep came in at just 52 minutes and awake time rose to 30, which pulled the score to 78 (fair) despite the extra time in bed. The autonomic picture is steady: HRV held at 37 (level vs the previous night, still just under the 40 baseline) and RHR stayed on the 7-day average at 54, with morning stress low at 19. Stage mix was light-led — 5h28 of light — with REM 1h23. Nights are labeled by the evening they start, so this one sits under Sat 11 (Saturday–Sunday), following Saturday's trap-bar deadlift. Readiness is good and the training week has clearly been absorbed. Today is a recovery day — rest, or an easy hike or bike; let the legs come back from Saturday's pulls before the next block.

hr.c4d: isto kao prethodna noć · −3 vs prosjek (40)
hr.c5d: izračunato iz sna, HRV-a, RHR-a, stresa i opterećenja
hr.today: Danas: odmor / lagano planinarenje ili bicikl
hr.rec: Duža, ali laganija noć za početak nedjelje: 7h43 uz ocjenu 78 i lijeganje u 22:16 — 14 minuta iznad 7-dnevnog prosjeka (7h29), ali je kvaliteta popustila. Dubokog sna bilo je samo 52 minute, a budnost je porasla na 30, što je spustilo ocjenu na 78 (solidno) unatoč višku vremena u krevetu. Autonomna slika je stabilna: HRV je ostao na 37 (isto kao prethodna noć, i dalje tik ispod osnovice od 40), a RHR na 7-dnevnom prosjeku od 54, uz nizak jutarnji stres 19. Struktura vođena laganim snom — 5h28 — uz REM 1h23. Noći se bilježe prema večeri kojom počinju, pa ova stoji pod Sub 11 (subota–nedjelja), nakon subotnjeg trap-bar mrtvog dizanja. Spremnost je dobra i trenažni tjedan je očito apsorbiran. Danas je dan oporavka — odmor ili lagano planinarenje/bicikl; neka se noge oporave od subotnjih dizanja prije sljedećeg bloka.
